# 11-Agent System v2.0 — AI Documentation

Generated 2026-05-03
https://github.com/nelsonhuynhs-ship-it/11-agent-system

## Overview
11-agent Claude workflow with MiniMax M2.7 delegation + 2 automation agents.

## 11 Core Agents
1. design-finder (Phase 1)
2. ux-reviewer (Phase 2)
3. code-reviewer (Phase 2)
4. security-auditor (Phase 2)
5. perf-analyzer (Phase 2)
6. master-executor (Phase 3)
7. test-writer (Phase 4)
8. doc-writer (Phase 4)
9. tech-debt-tracker (Phase 4)
10. git-commit (Phase 5)
11. i18n-checker (not used)

## Automation Agents (NEW)
- autopilot: Autonomous pipeline without human confirmation. Self-healing, 3x retry, auto-escalate.
- monitor: Observability agent. Track execution time, success rates, token usage, health alerts.

## Architecture
Phase 1: design-finder
Phase 2: ux-reviewer, code-reviewer, security-auditor, perf-analyzer (parallel)
Phase 3: master-executor
Phase 4: test-writer, doc-writer, tech-debt-tracker
Phase 5: git-commit

## v2.0 Improvements
- Two-stage review: spec compliance then code quality
- Fresh context isolation anti-patterns
- Model routing: M2.7 for mechanical, Opus for judgment
- Max 3 review iterations with escalation
- Mandatory final whole-implementation review
- Autopilot: autonomous loop without confirm
- Monitor: observability and health tracking

## Installation
git clone https://github.com/nelsonhuynhs-ship-it/11-agent-system.git
cd 11-agent-system
./install.sh

## Files
skills/ - 13 agent SKILL.md files (11 core + autopilot + monitor)
rules/orchestration-protocol.md
reports/ - review and execution reports
LLLMSEOF
echo "llms updated"
